title: eriogonum strictum var. greenei
intro: Eriogonum strictum var. greenei, also known as Greene's buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The herb can be prepared through infusions, tinctures, or teas, making it a versatile option for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
